hero.headline: Uros builds your internet presence
hero.subheadline: I specialize in creating powerful e-commerce solutions and comprehensive email marketing automation. From custom online stores, landing pages to complete email systems, attributing revenues up to 30%, I help businesses maximize their revenue and grow their customer base through strategic digital marketing.

testimonials.ctaHeading: Ready to join these satisfied clients?

about.heading: About Me
content: Hi, I'm Uros Korene, a passionate e-commerce developer and email marketing specialist based in Europe. With over 5+ Years of experience, I've successfully completed 20+ client projects, including complex e-commerce stores, marketplaces, and full email marketing setups.

My expertise spans across multiple platforms and technologies including WordPress, Shopify, WooCommerce, Klaviyo, MailerLite, ActiveCampaign, SendGrid, MailPoet, and FunnelKit. I specialize in creating high-performance websites with LiteSpeed optimization, multilingual support, and dynamic content management.

I focus on delivering comprehensive solutions that include e-commerce development, email automation, speed optimization, SEO structuring, and ongoing maintenance. Whether it's building multi-vendor marketplaces with Dokan, implementing Judge.me reviews, or managing multisite setups with cPanel, I ensure every project drives measurable results and revenue growth.

cta.heading: Ready to Grow Your Business?
cta.subheading: Let's work together to create a website that drives results and helps your business reach new heights.

contact.heading: Let's Work Together
contact.description: I'm always excited to work on new projects and help businesses grow. Feel free to reach out through any of the channels below.
